name: Stop AI Slop (Chinese)
description_en: Identify and remove the telltale patterns of Chinese AI writing—clichés, three-part parallelism (是…，是…，更是…), nominalized verbs, abstract subjects, aphoristic endings, and formulaic structure—so the text reads like a person speaking rather than a model generating.
description_zh: 识别并消除中文 AI 写作的典型痕迹——套话、排比三件套(是…，是…，更是…)、名词化、抽象主语、金句收尾、总分总八股——让文本读起来像有人在说话,而不是 AI 在生成。
long_en: A Chinese-specific writing-quality editor built from scratch for the Chinese 'AI smell' rather than translated from an English version, aimed at readability across articles, posts, official documents, abstracts, and copy.
long_zh: 一个针对中文「AI 味」从零打造(而非英文版翻译)的中文写作质量编辑器,面向公众号、帖子、公文、摘要与文案等场景的可读性提升。
sec_note_en: A prompt-based editing skill that rewrites your text for readability; it targets writing quality, not evading AI detectors. Review edits to preserve meaning.
sec_note_zh: 一个基于提示的编辑技能,为可读性重写你的文本;它针对的是写作质量,而非规避 AI 检测器。请审阅改动以保持原意。
